title: Gap Analysis & Missing Information Tracking
description: Identify and document all data gaps that block or degrade downstream analysis quality in the missing-information section. Known gaps include: absent Social Security benefit statements for both Paul and Margaret, unknown brokerage cost basis for taxable account, unclear Boeing pension details from Paul's 2001-2009 tenure (defined benefit vs rolled 401k?), absence of estate documents (wills, POA, trust status). Additionally identify: healthcare bridge cost gap (Paul's employer coverage ends at 63, Medicare at 65), ambiguity on whether $12,000/month target is inflation-adjusted, and whether target includes or excludes rental income. For each gap, document: what is missing, why it matters, what analysis is blocked or degraded, and recommended client action to resolve.
